narrative_summary: - User asked how to fix missing environment variables when running Dagster Plus pipelines locally
- Read `skills/dagster-expert/references/env-vars.md` to understand how `dg` handles environment variables
- Read `skills/dagster-expert/references/cli/plus/pull/env.md` to get details on the `dg plus pull env` command

- Responded with a concise answer covering: `dg plus login`, `dg plus pull env` to sync env vars from Dagster Plus to a local `.env` file, `dg list envs` to audit required vars, and a reminder to gitignore `.env`
